section.heading: Service life extension programs

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: Requirements for a Level 1 or Level 2 acquisition project or program under sections 1131 through 1134 shall not apply to an acquisition by the Coast Guard that is a service life extension program.

subsection.heading: Service Life Extension Program Defined.—
subsection.content: In this section, the term “service life extension program” means a capital investment that is solely intended to extend the service life and address obsolescence of components or systems of a particular capability or asset.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 119–60, div. G, title LXXII, § 7212(a), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1693.)
